name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn
N \in Nat
N > 0

(* State variables *)
state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
turn \in 1..N

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \* Process p attempts to enter critical section
        /\ \E p \in 1..N :
           /\ state[p] = "idle"
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
           /\ turn' = turn
        \/ \* Process p enters critical section
        /\ \E p \in 1..N :
           /\ state[p] = "trying"
           /\ turn = p
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
           /\ turn' = turn
        \/ \* Process p exits critical section
        /\ \E p \in 1..N :
           /\ state[p] = "critical"
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
           /\ turn' = turn
        \/ \* No change
        /\ state' = state
        /\ turn' = turn

(* Invariant: at most one process is in critical section *)
TypeOK == /\ \A p \in 1..N : state[p] \in {"idle", "trying", "critical"}
          /\ \A p, q \in 1..N : p /= q => ~(state[p] = "critical" /\ state[q] = "critical")

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, votes, decisions, coordinator, messages, logs
IsParticipant(p) == p \in participants
IsCoordinator(c) == c = coordinator
IsVote(v) == v \in {"yes", "no"}
IsDecision(d) == d \in {"commit", "abort"}
IsMessage(m) == m \in messages
IsLog(l) == l \in logs

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ participants \subseteq Nat
  /\ votes \in [participants -> {"yes", "no"}]
  /\ decisions \in [participants -> {"commit", "abort"}]
  /\ coordinator \in {"init", "preparing", "committing", "aborting", "done"}
  /\ messages \subseteq [sender \in participants \cup {"coordinator"}, receiver \in participants \cup {"coordinator"}, type \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}, content \in {"yes", "no", "commit", "abort"}]
  /\ logs \in [participants -> Seq({"commit")]

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ participants = {1, 2, ..., N}
  /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "yes"]
  /\ decisions = [p \in participants |-> "commit"]
  /\ coordinator = "init"
  /\ messages = {}
  /\ logs = [p \in participants |-> <<>>]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \/ CoordinatorAction
  \/ ParticipantAction

(* Coordinator actions *)
CoordinatorAction == 
  /\ coordinator = "init"
  /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Prepare", content |-> "prepare"] : p \in participants }
  /\ coordinator' = "preparing"
  /\ votes' = votes
  /\ decisions' = decisions
  /\ logs' = logs

  \/ /\ coordinator = "preparing"
     /\ \E p \in participants : [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "VoteYes", content |-> "yes"] \in messages
     /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "yes"]
     /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "VoteYes", content |-> "yes"] : p \in participants }
     /\ decisions' = decisions
     /\ logs' = logs
     /\ coordinator' = "preparing"

  \/ /\ coordinator = "preparing"
     /\ \E p \in participants : [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "VoteNo", content |-> "no"] \in messages
     /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "no"]
     /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "VoteNo", content |-> "no"] : p \in participants }
     /\ decisions' = decisions
     /\ logs' = logs
     /\ coordinator' = "preparing"

  \/ /\ coordinator = "preparing"
     /\ \A p \in participants : [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Commit", content |-> "commit"] \in messages
     /\ coordinator' = "committing"
     /\ decisions' = [p \in participants |-> "commit"]
     /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Commit", content |-> "commit"] : p \in participants }
     /\ logs' = logs

  \/ /\ coordinator = "preparing"
     /\ \A p \in participants : [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Abort", content |-> "abort"] \in messages
     /\ coordinator' = "aborting"
     /\ decisions' = [p \in participants |-> "abort"]
     /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Abort", content |-> "abort"] : p \in participants }
     /\ logs' = logs

  \/ /\ coordinator = "committing"
     /\ \E p \in participants : [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "Commit", content |-> "commit"] \in messages
     /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "Commit", content |-> "commit"] : p \in participants }
     /\ logs' = [logs EXCEPT ![p] = Append(logs[p], "commit") : p \in participants]
     /\ coordinator' = "committing"

  \/ /\ coordinator = "aborting"
     /\ \E p \in participants : [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "Abort", content |-> "abort"] \in messages
     /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "Abort", content |-> "abort"] : p \in participants }
     /\ logs' = [logs EXCEPT ![p] = Append(logs[p], "abort") : p \in participants]
     /\ coordinator' = "aborting"

  \/ /\ coordinator = "committing"
     /\ \A p \in participants : [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "Commit", content |-> "commit"] \in messages
     /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "Commit", content |-> "commit"] : p \in participants }
     /\ logs' = [logs EXCEPT ![p] = Append(logs[p], "commit") : p \in participants]
     /\ coordinator' = "done"

  \/ /\ coordinator = "aborting"
     /\ \A p \in participants : [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "Abort", content |-> "abort"] \in messages
     /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "Abort", content |-> "abort"] : p \in participants }
     /\ logs' = [logs EXCEPT ![p] = Append(logs[p], "abort") : p \in participants]
     /\ coordinator' = "done"

(* Participant actions *)
ParticipantAction == 
  \/ /\ \E p \in participants : [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Prepare", content |-> "prepare"] \in messages
     /\ [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "VoteYes", content |-> "yes"] \in messages
     /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Prepare", content |-> "prepare"] : p \in participants }
     /\ logs' = logs
     /\ votes' = votes
     /\ decisions' = decisions
     /\ coordinator' = coordinator

  \/ /\ \E p \in participants : [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Commit", content |-> "commit"] \in messages
     /\ [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "Commit", content |-> "commit"] \in messages
     /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Commit", content |-> "commit"] : p \in participants }
     /\ logs' = [logs EXCEPT ![p] = Append(logs[p], "commit") : p \in participants]
     /\ votes' = votes
     /\ decisions' = decisions
     /\ coordinator' = coordinator

  \/ /\ \E p \in participants : [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Abort", content |-> "abort"] \in messages
     /\ [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "Abort", content |-> "abort"] \in messages
     /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Abort", content |-> "abort"] : p \in participants }
     /\ logs' = [logs EXCEPT ![p] = Append(logs[p], "abort") : p \in participants]
     /\ votes' = votes
     /\ decisions' = decisions
     /\ coordinator' = coordinator

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, votes, decisions, coordinator, messages, logs>>

Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

(* TypeOK ensures that q is a sequence of length K, head and tail are integers in 0..K-1, and count is an integer in 0..K *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(K)
  /\ head \in 0..K-1
  /\ tail \in 0..K-1
  /\ count \in 0..K

(* The queue is represented as a circular buffer of length K. head points to the next element to consume, tail points to the next slot to produce. count is the number of elements in the queue. *)
Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 0
  /\ tail = 0
  /\ count = 0

(* The producer action: if the queue is not full, it writes a value at tail and updates tail and count. *)
Producer == 
  /\ count < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, value)  (* value is a placeholder for the produced item *)
  /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
  /\ count' = count + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<head, q>>

(* The consumer action: if the queue is not empty, it reads the value at head and updates head and count. *)
Consumer == 
  /\ count > 0
  /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
  /\ count' = count - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<tail, q>>

(* Next action: either the producer or the consumer acts. *)
Next == 
  \/ Producer
  \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>> /\ TypeOK

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active, r

Init == /\ readers = <<>> \\
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers \\
          /\ r' = r \\
             /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
             /\ readers' = Append(readers, r) \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
                /\ readers' = <<>> \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
                /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_CAPACITY
VARIABLES channel, chunks, file, retransmitCount, sentChunks

Init ==
    /\ file = <<>>
    /\ chunks = <<>>
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ file' = Append(file, <<>>)
       /\ chunks' = Append(chunks, <<>>)
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, <<>>)
       /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 0)
       /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 0)
       /\ channel' = Append(channel, <<>>)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<channel, chunks, file, retransmitCount, sentChunks>>
